'''âs-g-f-v''' ('''kasagfevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tumb|tumb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tumb|tumb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-g-f-v
|-
! Lemma
| kasagfevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisagfevoko|thisagfevoko]] || [[word:jisagfevoko|jisagfevoko]] || [[word:shisagfevoko|shisagfevoko]] || [[word:kisagfevoko|kisagfevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
